business_context: You are the friendly WhatsApp assistant for Tulum Botox, a luxury aesthetic clinic in Tulum and Playa del Carmen, Mexico. Use ONLY the information in this file and the FAQ data when answering. Never mention Rent A Scooter Tulum, scooters, ATVs, or any vehicle-related services. Branding: display name is Tulum Botox; general info at www.tulumbotox.com; BOOKING at www.tulumbotox.com/book; location Tulum Centro; also in Playa del Carmen (PDC); WhatsApp +52 984 105 0808; Email Ally@TulumBotox.com; Instagram @tulumbotox; Google Maps https://maps.google.com/?q=20.210726,-87.460243. Key product facts: When asked about Botox, ALWAYS mention BOTH Allergan Botox AND Dysport — both are neurotoxins (NOT fillers), and both are priced at 135 MXN per unit; Juvederm is an HA filler by Allergan starting at 8,900 MXN/CC — Allergan makes both Botox and Juvederm but they are completely different products; Radiesse is a CaHA filler/biostimulator at 10,500 MXN; Sculptra is a collagen biostimulator (NOT a filler) at 17,000 MXN; HarmonyCa is a hybrid HA+CaHA filler at 22,000 MXN for 2 syringes; CO2 Laser is a skin resurfacing treatment and is completely different from laser hair removal which is a separate service; credit card fee is 5%. Response rules: ALWAYS respond in the exact same language the customer wrote in — if they wrote in English respond in English, if they wrote in Spanish respond in Spanish, never switch languages; always end responses by encouraging the customer to book at www.tulumbotox.com/book; keep replies short (2-4 sentences); be warm, friendly, and professional; use emojis sparingly; never guarantee results or invent information; for medical questions (pregnancy, allergies, contraindications) tell the customer to book a consultation at www.tulumbotox.com/book.

media_response.en: Thanks for sending that! 📸 Our team will take a look and get back to you. For booking, visit www.tulumbotox.com/book or WhatsApp us at +52 984 105 0808.
media_response.es: ¡Gracias por enviarlo! 📸 Nuestro equipo lo revisará y te responderá. Para reservas, visita www.tulumbotox.com/book o escríbenos al +52 984 105 0808.

unknown_message.es: ¡Hola! Por favor envía un mensaje de texto y con gusto te ayudaremos. También puedes reservar directamente en www.tulumbotox.com/book 💉

ai_fallback.en: Thanks for reaching out to Tulum Botox! 😊 I'd love to help. What are you looking to treat? You can also book a free consultation directly at www.tulumbotox.com/book!
ai_fallback.es: ¡Gracias por contactar a Tulum Botox! 😊 Con gusto te ayudo. ¿Qué tratamiento te interesa? También puedes reservar una consulta gratuita en www.tulumbotox.com/book.

opt_out_confirmation.en: You've been unsubscribed and will not receive further automated messages from Tulum BTX. To re-enable contact, visit www.tulumbotox.com or WhatsApp +52 984 105 0808.
opt_out_confirmation.es: Has cancelado la suscripción y no recibirás más mensajes automáticos de Tulum BTX. Para reactivar contacto, visita www.tulumbotox.com o escríbenos al +52 984 105 0808.

privacy_notice_suffix.es: Al chatear con nosotros, aceptas nuestro Aviso de Privacidad: https://www.tulumbotox.com/privacy

missed_call.en: 👋 Hi! We missed your call. Please reply here to chat with us, or book online: https://www.tulumbotox.com/book
missed_call.es: 👋 ¡Hola! Perdimos tu llamada. Escríbenos aquí para chatear con nosotros o reserva en línea: https://www.tulumbotox.com/book

faq.question: What is Tulum Botox?
faq.answer_en: Tulum Botox is a luxury aesthetic clinic in Tulum, Mexico specializing in Botox, dermal fillers, skin rejuvenation, body contouring, and more. We have internationally trained physicians with 10+ years of experience and a boutique, personalized approach to beauty.
faq.answer_es: Tulum Botox es una clínica estética de lujo en Tulum, México especializada en Botox, rellenos dérmicos, rejuvenecimiento de piel, contorno corporal y más. Contamos con médicos con formación internacional y más de 10 años de experiencia.

faq.question: Where are you located?
faq.answer_en: We're in Tulum Centro. Find us on Google Maps: https://maps.google.com/?q=20.210726,-87.460243 — We also serve Playa del Carmen (PDC). Book at tulumbotox.com/book! 📍
faq.answer_es: Estamos en el Centro de Tulum. Encuéntranos en Google Maps: https://maps.google.com/?q=20.210726,-87.460243 — También atendemos en Playa del Carmen (PDC). ¡Reserva en tulumbotox.com/book! 📍

faq.question: How do I book an appointment?
faq.answer_en: Book directly at www.tulumbotox.com/book — select your treatment, pick a time, and you're all set! 📅
faq.answer_es: ¡Reserva directamente en www.tulumbotox.com/book — selecciona tu tratamiento, elige un horario y listo! 📅

faq.question: Who performs the treatments?
faq.answer_en: All treatments are performed by internationally trained doctors and nurses with 10+ years of experience. Each practitioner specializes in specific treatments.
faq.answer_es: Todos los tratamientos son realizados por médicos y enfermeras con formación internacional y más de 10 años de experiencia. Cada profesional se especializa en tratamientos específicos.

faq.question: What are your hours?
faq.answer_en: We're available by appointment. Book through our website www.tulumbotox.com/book or message us on WhatsApp at +52 984 105 0808.
faq.answer_es: Estamos disponibles con cita previa. Reserva en www.tulumbotox.com/book o escríbenos por WhatsApp al +52 984 105 0808.

faq.question: Do you offer free consultations?
faq.answer_en: Yes! We offer free consultations — no commitment required. Book at www.tulumbotox.com/book or message us on WhatsApp. 😊
faq.answer_es: ¡Sí! Ofrecemos consultas gratuitas, sin compromiso. Reserva en www.tulumbotox.com/book o escríbenos por WhatsApp. 😊

faq.question: Do you have locations outside Tulum?
faq.answer_en: Yes! We also serve Playa del Carmen (PDC) in the Riviera Maya. Book through www.tulumbotox.com/book for the location nearest you.
faq.answer_es: ¡Sí! También atendemos en Playa del Carmen (PDC) en la Riviera Maya. Reserva en www.tulumbotox.com/book para la ubicación más cercana.

faq.question: Can I see before & after photos?
faq.answer_en: Yes! Check out our Instagram @tulumbotox for before & after photos. You can also request photos for specific treatments during your consultation.
faq.answer_es: ¡Sí! Visita nuestro Instagram @tulumbotox para fotos de antes y después. También puedes pedir fotos de tratamientos específicos durante tu consulta.

faq.question: What should I expect on my first visit?
faq.answer_en: First, a free consultation where the doctor reviews your goals and recommends a treatment plan. Then we apply numbing cream, perform the treatment, and go over aftercare. Most visits take 30–45 minutes. 😊
faq.answer_es: Primero, una consulta gratuita donde el médico revisa tus objetivos y recomienda un plan. Luego aplicamos crema anestésica, realizamos el tratamiento y repasamos los cuidados posteriores. La mayoría de las visitas toman 30–45 minutos. 😊

faq.question: What services do you offer?
faq.answer_en: We offer Botox (Allergan & Dysport), dermal fillers, rhinomodeling, PDO threads, CO2 laser skin resurfacing, stem cell IV therapy, facials, body contouring, tattoo removal, laser hair removal, blepharoplasty, and more! See the full menu at tulumbotox.com/book. 💉
faq.answer_es: Ofrecemos Botox (Allergan y Dysport), rellenos dérmicos, rinomodelación, hilos PDO, láser CO2 (resurfacing), terapia IV con células madre, faciales, contorno corporal, eliminación de tatuajes, depilación láser, blefaroplastia y más. ¡Ve el menú completo en tulumbotox.com/book! 💉

faq.question: What brand of Botox do you use?
faq.answer_en: We offer both Allergan Botox and Dysport — two premium neurotoxins, both priced at 135 MXN per unit. Your provider will recommend the best option for your goals during your free consultation. Book at www.tulumbotox.com/book! 💉
faq.answer_es: Ofrecemos tanto Allergan Botox como Dysport — dos neurotoxinas premium, ambas a 135 MXN por unidad. Tu médico te recomendará la mejor opción durante tu consulta gratuita. ¡Reserva en www.tulumbotox.com/book! 💉

faq.question: What is Dysport?
faq.answer_en: Dysport is one of the two Botox neurotoxins we offer (alongside Allergan Botox). Made by Galderma, it's known for fast onset (2–3 days) and natural spread. Both Dysport and Allergan Botox are 135 MXN per unit. Book at www.tulumbotox.com/book! 💉
faq.answer_es: Dysport es una de las dos neurotoxinas Botox que ofrecemos (junto con Allergan Botox). Fabricado por Galderma, conocido por su rápido inicio (2–3 días). Tanto Dysport como Allergan Botox son 135 MXN por unidad. ¡Reserva en www.tulumbotox.com/book! 💉

faq.question: What fillers do you offer?
faq.answer_en: We offer Juvederm (HA filler), Radiesse (CaHA), Sculptra (collagen biostimulator), and HarmonyCa (hybrid filler). Each works differently and is suited to different goals. Book a free consultation at www.tulumbotox.com/book to find the right one for you!
faq.answer_es: Ofrecemos Juvederm (relleno HA), Radiesse (CaHA), Sculptra (bioestimulador de colágeno) y HarmonyCa (relleno híbrido). Cada uno funciona diferente y es ideal para distintos objetivos. ¡Reserva una consulta gratuita en www.tulumbotox.com/book para encontrar el adecuado para ti!

faq.question: What is Juvederm?
faq.answer_en: Juvederm is a hyaluronic acid (HA) filler made by Allergan/AbbVie. It provides immediate, natural-looking volume and is great for lips, cheeks, and facial contouring. It starts at 8,900 MXN per CC.
faq.answer_es: Juvederm es un relleno de ácido hialurónico (HA) fabricado por Allergan/AbbVie. Proporciona volumen inmediato y natural, ideal para labios, pómulos y contorno facial. Comienza en 8,900 MXN por CC.

faq.question: What is Sculptra?
faq.answer_en: Sculptra is a collagen biostimulator (poly-L-lactic acid) — it's different from traditional fillers. Instead of adding volume directly, it gradually stimulates your own collagen production over weeks/months for natural, long-lasting results (up to 2 years). 17,000 MXN.
faq.answer_es: Sculptra es un bioestimulador de colágeno (ácido poli-L-láctico) — es diferente a los rellenos tradicionales. En lugar de agregar volumen directamente, estimula gradualmente la producción de colágeno propio durante semanas/meses para resultados naturales y duraderos (hasta 2 años). 17,000 MXN.

faq.question: What is Radiesse?
faq.answer_en: Radiesse is a calcium hydroxylapatite (CaHA) filler made by Merz. It provides immediate volume AND stimulates collagen production over time (biostimulatory). Great for lifting and contouring. 10,500 MXN.
faq.answer_es: Radiesse es un relleno de hidroxiapatita cálcica (CaHA) fabricado por Merz. Proporciona volumen inmediato Y estimula la producción de colágeno con el tiempo. Excelente para lifting y contorno. 10,500 MXN.

faq.question: What is HarmonyCa?
faq.answer_en: HarmonyCa is a first-of-its-kind hybrid filler by Allergan — it combines HA (immediate volume) with CaHA microspheres (long-term collagen stimulation). Best for cheeks, jawline, and chin. 22,000 MXN for 2 syringes.
faq.answer_es: HarmonyCa es un relleno híbrido único de Allergan — combina HA (volumen inmediato) con microesferas de CaHA (estimulación de colágeno a largo plazo). Ideal para pómulos, mandíbula y mentón. 22,000 MXN por 2 jeringas.

faq.question: What is rhinomodeling?
faq.answer_en: Rhinomodeling is a non-surgical nose reshaping treatment using HA filler injections. No surgery, no downtime — results are visible immediately. We can correct bumps, asymmetry, tip shape, and more. 9,500 MXN.
faq.answer_es: La rinomodelación es un tratamiento no quirúrgico para remodelar la nariz usando inyecciones de relleno HA. Sin cirugía, sin tiempo de recuperación — los resultados son inmediatos. Corregimos gibas, asimetrías, forma de la punta y más. 9,500 MXN.

faq.question: What are PDO threads?
faq.answer_en: PDO threads are a non-surgical thread lift using polydioxanone (PDO) threads. They physically lift sagging skin and stimulate collagen production. Great for cheeks, jawline, and neck. Results last 18 months to 2 years. 7,500 MXN for 4 threads.
faq.answer_es: Los hilos PDO son un lifting no quirúrgico usando hilos de polidioxanona (PDO). Levantan físicamente la piel flácida y estimulan la producción de colágeno. Ideales para pómulos, mandíbula y cuello. Los resultados duran de 18 meses a 2 años. 7,500 MXN por 4 hilos.

faq.question: What is CO2 laser?
faq.answer_en: CO2 laser is an ablative skin resurfacing treatment — it targets wrinkles, scars, uneven pigmentation, and skin texture. It is NOT laser hair removal. Recovery is up to 2 weeks. Pricing: Small Area 4,300 MXN | Medium 9,500 MXN | Large 19,000 MXN.
faq.answer_es: El láser CO2 es un tratamiento ablativo de resurfacing de piel — trata arrugas, cicatrices, pigmentación irregular y textura de la piel. NO es depilación láser. La recuperación es de hasta 2 semanas. Precios: Área Pequeña 4,300 MXN | Mediana 9,500 MXN | Grande 19,000 MXN.

faq.question: Do you offer laser hair removal?
faq.answer_en: Yes, we offer laser hair removal — priced by consultation depending on the treatment area. This is a completely separate service from our CO2 laser skin resurfacing. Book a free consult at tulumbotox.com/book!
faq.answer_es: Sí, ofrecemos depilación láser — con precio por consulta según el área a tratar. Es un servicio completamente separado del láser CO2 de resurfacing de piel. ¡Reserva una consulta gratuita en tulumbotox.com/book!

faq.question: Do you offer stem cell therapy?
faq.answer_en: Yes! We offer Stem Cell IV Therapy — a cutting-edge regenerative treatment. Pricing: Face 9,200 MXN | IV 50 Mill Body 28,000 MXN | IV 100 Mill Body 53,500 MXN. Book a consultation at tulumbotox.com/book!
faq.answer_es: ¡Sí! Ofrecemos Terapia IV con Células Madre — un tratamiento regenerativo de vanguardia. Precios: Cara 9,200 MXN | IV 50 Mill Cuerpo 28,000 MXN | IV 100 Mill Cuerpo 53,500 MXN. ¡Reserva una consulta en tulumbotox.com/book!

faq.question: Do you do facials?
faq.answer_en: Yes! We offer a range of facial treatments including Hydrafacial, PRP Facial, Face Peels, Micro-Needling, Dermapen, and more. Prices start at 2,000 MXN. See the full menu at tulumbotox.com/book!
faq.answer_es: ¡Sí! Ofrecemos una variedad de tratamientos faciales: Hydrafacial, Facial PRP, Peelings, Micro-Needling, Dermapen y más. Los precios comienzan desde 2,000 MXN. ¡Ve el menú completo en tulumbotox.com/book!

faq.question: What is a PRP facial?
faq.answer_en: A PRP (Platelet-Rich Plasma) facial uses your own blood platelets to rejuvenate the skin — promoting collagen production and skin renewal. It's a completely natural treatment. 5,500 MXN at Tulum Botox.
faq.answer_es: Un facial PRP (Plasma Rico en Plaquetas) usa las propias plaquetas de tu sangre para rejuvenecer la piel — promoviendo colágeno y renovación celular. Es un tratamiento completamente natural. 5,500 MXN en Tulum Botox.

faq.question: What is dermapen / micro-needling?
faq.answer_en: Dermapen (micro-needling) uses fine needles to create micro-channels in the skin, stimulating collagen production. It's often combined with serums like hyaluronic acid, vitamin C, exosomes, or PDRN for enhanced results. Prices start at 4,000 MXN.
faq.answer_es: El Dermapen (micro-needling) usa finas agujas para crear microcanales en la piel, estimulando la producción de colágeno. Suele combinarse con sueros como ácido hialurónico, vitamina C, exosomas o PDRN. Los precios comienzan en 4,000 MXN.

faq.question: Do you offer mole removal?
faq.answer_en: Yes! We offer mole removal. Book a consultation at www.tulumbotox.com/book so our doctor can evaluate the mole and recommend the best approach for you.
faq.answer_es: ¡Sí! Ofrecemos eliminación de lunares. Reserva una consulta en www.tulumbotox.com/book para que nuestro médico evalúe el lunar y recomiende el mejor método.

faq.question: Do you offer body contouring?
faq.answer_en: Yes! Our Booty Volume treatment uses 6ML of HA filler for natural enhancement — 23,400 MXN. For a full body contouring consultation, book at tulumbotox.com/book. 🍑
faq.answer_es: ¡Sí! Nuestro tratamiento de Volumen de Glúteos usa 6ML de relleno HA para realce natural — 23,400 MXN. Para una consulta completa de contorno corporal, reserva en tulumbotox.com/book. 🍑

faq.question: How much does Botox/Dysport cost?
faq.answer_en: Both Allergan Botox and Dysport are 135 MXN per unit. The number of units depends on the treatment area. Book a free consultation at www.tulumbotox.com/book for an exact quote! 💉
faq.answer_es: Tanto Allergan Botox como Dysport cuestan 135 MXN por unidad. El número de unidades depende del área de tratamiento. ¡Reserva una consulta gratuita en www.tulumbotox.com/book para una cotización exacta! 💉

faq.question: How much is lip filler?
faq.answer_en: Lip filler (Juvederm HA) starts at 8,900 MXN per CC. Most lips need 1–2 CC depending on your goals. Book a free consultation at tulumbotox.com/book! 💋
faq.answer_es: El relleno de labios (Juvederm HA) comienza en 8,900 MXN por CC. La mayoría de los labios necesitan 1–2 CC. ¡Reserva una consulta gratuita en tulumbotox.com/book! 💋

faq.question: How much do fillers cost?
faq.answer_en: Filler prices depend on the type: Juvederm (HA) starts at 8,900 MXN/CC. For Radiesse, Sculptra, or HarmonyCa pricing, visit www.tulumbotox.com/book or book a free consultation — we'll recommend the right option for you!
faq.answer_es: Los precios de rellenos dependen del tipo: Juvederm (HA) comienza en 8,900 MXN/CC. Para precios de Radiesse, Sculptra o HarmonyCa, visita www.tulumbotox.com/book o reserva una consulta gratuita.

faq.question: How much does rhinomodeling cost?
faq.answer_en: Rhinomodeling (non-surgical nose reshaping) is 9,500 MXN. Book at tulumbotox.com/book! 👃
faq.answer_es: La rinomodelación (remodelación nasal no quirúrgica) cuesta 9,500 MXN. ¡Reserva en tulumbotox.com/book! 👃

faq.question: How much do threads cost?
faq.answer_en: PDO threads (4) are 7,500 MXN. Book a consultation at www.tulumbotox.com/book for a custom quote based on your needs!
faq.answer_es: Los hilos PDO (4) cuestan 7,500 MXN. ¡Reserva una consulta en www.tulumbotox.com/book para una cotización personalizada!

faq.question: How much do facials cost?
faq.answer_en: Facial prices start at 2,000 MXN (Hydrafacial). Popular options: PRP Facial 5,500 MXN | Micro-Needling + Facial 3,700 MXN | Face Peel 3,000 MXN. Full menu at tulumbotox.com/book!
faq.answer_es: Los precios de faciales comienzan en 2,000 MXN (Hydrafacial). Opciones populares: PRP Facial 5,500 MXN | Micro-Needling + Facial 3,700 MXN | Face Peel 3,000 MXN. ¡Menú completo en tulumbotox.com/book!

faq.question: How much does CO2 laser cost?
faq.answer_en: CO2 Laser skin resurfacing: Small Area 4,300 MXN | Medium Area 9,500 MXN | Large Area 19,000 MXN. Book at tulumbotox.com/book! (Note: this is skin resurfacing — ask separately about laser hair removal.)
faq.answer_es: Láser CO2 (resurfacing de piel): Área Pequeña 4,300 MXN | Área Mediana 9,500 MXN | Área Grande 19,000 MXN. ¡Reserva en tulumbotox.com/book! (Nota: esto es resurfacing de piel — pregunta por separado sobre depilación láser.)

faq.question: Are prices in MXN or USD?
faq.answer_en: All prices are in Mexican Pesos (MXN). We accept cash in USD or MXN, credit cards (5% fee), and Wise/TransferWise. Visit www.tulumbotox.com/book for current pricing.
faq.answer_es: Todos los precios son en Pesos Mexicanos (MXN). Aceptamos efectivo en USD o MXN, tarjetas de crédito (cargo del 5%) y Wise/TransferWise. Visita www.tulumbotox.com/book para precios actuales.

faq.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.answer_en: We accept: 💵 Cash (USD or MXN) | 💳 Credit cards (5% processing fee) | 🌐 Wise/TransferWise. Cash and Wise have no extra fees!
faq.answer_es: Aceptamos: 💵 Efectivo (USD o MXN) | 💳 Tarjetas de crédito (5% de cargo) | 🌐 Wise/TransferWise. ¡Efectivo y Wise sin cargos extra!

faq.question: Is it safe to get Botox in Mexico?
faq.answer_en: Absolutely! We use only FDA-approved products — Allergan Botox and Dysport — administered by internationally trained doctors with 10+ years of experience. We combine medical excellence with a boutique, personalized approach. 💉
faq.answer_es: ¡Absolutamente! Usamos solo productos aprobados por la FDA — Allergan Botox y Dysport — administrados por médicos con formación internacional y más de 10 años de experiencia. Combinamos excelencia médica con un enfoque boutique y personalizado. 💉

faq.question: What are the side effects of Botox or filler?
faq.answer_en: Common side effects include minor swelling, redness, or bruising at injection sites — these typically resolve within hours to a few days. We provide full aftercare instructions at your appointment.
faq.answer_es: Los efectos secundarios comunes incluyen hinchazón leve, enrojecimiento o moretones en los sitios de inyección — generalmente se resuelven en horas o pocos días. Te damos instrucciones completas de cuidado posterior.

faq.question: Does Botox or filler hurt?
faq.answer_en: We apply topical numbing cream before all injectable treatments, and procedures are very quick. Most clients describe it as minimal discomfort — a small pinch that's over fast! 😊
faq.answer_es: Aplicamos crema anestésica tópica antes de todos los tratamientos inyectables, y los procedimientos son muy rápidos. La mayoría de los clientes lo describen como una molestia mínima. 😊

faq.question: Can I fly after getting Botox or filler?
faq.answer_en: Yes! You can fly the same day after Botox. For fillers, we recommend waiting 24–48 hours if possible. Avoid intense sun, alcohol, and strenuous exercise for 24 hours after treatment. ✈️
faq.answer_es: ¡Sí! Puedes volar el mismo día después del Botox. Para rellenos, recomendamos esperar 24–48 horas si es posible. Evita sol intenso, alcohol y ejercicio intenso por 24 horas después. ✈️

faq.question: What about touch-ups?
faq.answer_en: Botox touch-ups can be done 2 weeks after treatment if needed. Filler touch-ups are also recommended at 2 weeks — this lets the product settle so we can fine-tune your results. We want you to love your look! 💉
faq.answer_es: Los retoques de Botox se pueden hacer 2 semanas después si es necesario. Los retoques de relleno también se recomiendan a las 2 semanas — permite que el producto se asiente para ajustar los resultados. 💉

faq.answer_en: Follow us on Instagram @tulumbotox for before & after photos, treatment info, and updates! 📸
faq.answer_es: ¡Síguenos en Instagram @tulumbotox para fotos de antes y después, info de tratamientos y novedades! 📸
